name: recodex
description: Re:CodeX — VTuber-themed Discord bot platform (backoffice + 2 bots + API)

scripts.prisma:generate: npm --workspace @recodex/db-points run prisma:generate && npm --workspace @recodex/db-app run prisma:generate
scripts.prisma:migrate: npm --workspace @recodex/db-points run prisma:migrate && npm --workspace @recodex/db-app run prisma:migrate
